name: Banana Bread, Hamilton Hall
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together dry ingredients - set aside.
2. Cream butter and sugar. Add eggs. Mix in the sifted dry ingredients, vanilla, and mashed bananas.
3. Quickly stir in the buttermilk and brown sugar.
4. Bake in a greased loaf pan for about 1 hour at 350°F.
